name: ui-dismantler
description: HTML 拆解为可复用组件库 - agent 驱动 + 确定性工具层

scripts.verify: python3 src/skill/scripts/validate_lib.py benchmark/lib && python3 scripts/roundtrip.py benchmark/original.html --lib benchmark/lib
scripts.analyze:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js analyze
scripts.validate:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js validate
scripts.roundtrip:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js roundtrip
scripts.quality:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js quality
scripts.visual:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js roundtrip
scripts.test:planning-regression:ts: npm run build:ts && node --test dist-ts/tests/case-regression.test.js --test-name-pattern="formal planning regression"
scripts.test:gold:ts: npm run build:ts && UI_DISMANTLER_GOLD_REGRESSION=1 node --test dist-ts/tests/case-regression.test.js
scripts.test:gold:optimized:ts: npm run build:ts && UI_DISMANTLER_GOLD_REGRESSION=1 UI_DISMANTLER_BROWSER_MODE=shared-browser UI_DISMANTLER_BROWSER_CONCURRENCY=1 UI_DISMANTLER_BROWSER_RESOURCE_CACHE=run-local UI_DISMANTLER_BROWSER_STABILITY=adaptive node --test dist-ts/tests/case-regression.test.js
